title: How to use ChatGPT safely
description: A guide on using artificial intelligence chat tools while protecting your personal privacy.

steps.title: Never enter private info
steps.body: Do not type passwords, home addresses, phone numbers, or credit card details into ChatGPT. The system saves questions to learn.

steps.title: Avoid work or medical secrets
steps.body: Do not upload sensitive corporate documents or write down personal medical problems in the chat box.

steps.title: Double-check AI facts
steps.body: AI can sometimes make up incorrect facts or figures (known as hallucinations). Always check important details using search engines.

steps.title: Treat AI like a public talk
steps.body: Only write questions and text that you would feel comfortable showing to a friendly helper in public.

glossary.definition: Computer systems designed to understand language, answer questions, and solve problems like a human helper.
When an AI helper confidently gives you an answer that is completely made up or factually incorrect.
